title: decamerium hirtellum
intro: Decamerium hirtellum, also known as the hairy ten-angled stick plant or hairy stick plant, is a tropical plant native to the forests of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Decamerium hirtellum include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Decamerium hirtellum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
